task_language: Put the bowl on the stove
strategy_notes: Perception-only localization: from agentview world_00.npy, the akita_black_bowl_1 was identified at world (-0.083, -0.025, z_rim=0.962); the stove burner/cook_region was localized by sampling pixels of the dark coiled burner disc visible in image_cam_00, giving approximate world (-0.05, -0.247, z=0.927). Plan: (1) move above bowl xy, (2) pi0_pick 'pick up the black bowl' from default home-style pre-pos at z=1.10, (3) carry over the stove fixture, (4) release onto the cook_region. KEY INSIGHT (memory #33): Pi0 rim-hooks bowls with the bowl ~4.5cm in eef-frame -y; eef_y_target = predicate_y + 0.045. First 2 release attempts (at eef (-0.017,-0.219) and (0.0,-0.26)) put the bowl at world (-0.07,-0.20) and (+0.02,-0.28) respectively, both missing the cook_region predicate. Applying the +0.045 y-offset compensation, eef target became (-0.05, -0.20) to land the bowl at world (-0.05, -0.245) — the visible burner disc center. After re-picking with pi0_pick (success again) and moving to (-0.05,-0.20,1.00) then release, libero_terminated fired on the third placement attempt. Localization used both agentview world_NN.npy (coarse object choice) and wrist world_wrist_NN.npy (precise burner disc check at ~20cm hover). No teleport primitives; pi0_pick + scripted OSC move_to + release only.
